name: 許慎
summary: 秦汉时期历史人物，生于30—124年。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 秦汉 period, lived 30–124. Documented in historical sources.
description: 許慎（30—124年），秦汉人物。秦汉时期（前221—公元220年）是中国历史上第一个大一统帝国时代，秦朝确立中央集权制度，汉朝继承并发展了这套制度，奠定了中华文明的基本格局。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 許慎 (30–124) was a figure of the 秦汉 period. The Qin-Han period (221 BCE–220 CE) was China's first great imperial age. The Qin established centralized rule, and the Han inherited and developed this system, laying the foundations of Chinese civilization. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

name: 班昭
summary: 东汉时期女性历史人物，生于49—120年。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 东汉 period (female), lived 49–120. Documented in historical sources.
description: 班昭（49—120年），东汉人物。东汉（25—220年）是刘秀推翻王莽新朝后重建的汉政权，定都洛阳。东汉前期光武中兴、明章之治，国力强盛；后期外戚与宦官交替专权，终致黄巾起义与群雄割据。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 班昭 (49–120) was a figure of the 东汉 period. The Eastern Han (25–220 CE) was the restored Han dynasty founded by Liu Xiu, with its capital at Luoyang. It saw a period of revival followed by the rise of eunuch and consort clan power struggles, ultimately leading to the Yellow Turban Rebellion. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

name: 顧雍
summary: 孙吴时期历史人物，生于168—243年。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 孙吴 period, lived 168–243. Documented in historical sources.
description: 顧雍（168—243年），孙吴人物。孙吴（222—280年）是三国之一，孙权在江东建立的政权，以建业（今南京）为都，拥有强大的水军，开发了江南地区。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 顧雍 (168–243) was a figure of the 孙吴 period. Sun Wu (222–280) was one of the Three Kingdoms, established by Sun Quan in the Jiangdong region with its capital at Jianye (Nanjing), known for its powerful navy. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

description: 辛憲英（191—269年），曹魏人物。曹魏（220—265年）是三国之一，曹丕篡汉建立，定都洛阳，占据北方广大地区，实力最为雄厚，后被司马氏篡夺。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 辛憲英 (191–269) was a figure of the 曹魏 period. Cao Wei (220–265) was the strongest of the Three Kingdoms, founded by Cao Pi in the north with its capital at Luoyang. It was later usurped by the Sima clan. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

summaryEn: Historical figure of the 北魏 period, lived 402–468. Documented in historical sources.
description: 唐和（402—468年），北魏人物。北魏（386—534年）是北朝的第一个朝代，鲜卑拓跋氏建立，统一北方，孝文帝推行汉化改革，迁都洛阳，对民族融合贡献巨大。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 唐和 (402–468) was a figure of the 北魏 period. The Northern Wei (386–534) unified northern China under the Xianbei Tuoba clan. Emperor Xiaowen's sinicization reforms, including moving the capital to Luoyang, profoundly shaped Chinese history. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

name: 劉義隆
summary: 刘宋时期历史人物，生于407—453年。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 刘宋 period, lived 407–453. Documented in historical sources.
description: 劉義隆（407—453年），刘宋人物。刘宋（420—479年）是南朝的第一个朝代，刘裕建立，定都建康（今南京），是南朝疆域最广、国力最强盛的一朝。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 劉義隆 (407–453) was a figure of the 刘宋 period. The Liu Song dynasty (420–479) was the first of the Southern Dynasties, founded by Liu Yu with its capital at Jiankang, boasting the largest territory among the southern regimes. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

name: 鮑昭
summary: 南北朝时期历史人物，生于412—466年。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 南北朝 period, lived 412–466. Documented in historical sources.
description: 鮑昭（412—466年），南北朝人物。南北朝时期（420—589年）是东晋灭亡后中国南北分裂的时代，南朝经历了宋、齐、梁、陈四个汉族政权，北朝经历了北魏、东魏、西魏、北齐、北周等政权，是民族大融合的重要阶段。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 鮑昭 (412–466) was a figure of the 南北朝 period. The Northern and Southern Dynasties period (420–589) was an era of division between northern and southern China, marked by frequent regime changes and significant ethnic integration. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

name: 沈約
summary: 南梁时期历史人物，生于441—513年。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 南梁 period, lived 441–513. Documented in historical sources.
description: 沈約（441—513年），南梁人物。南梁（502—557年）是南朝的第三个朝代，萧衍（梁武帝）所建，定都建康，梁武帝崇佛，文化发达，后期发生侯景之乱而衰落。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 沈約 (441–513) was a figure of the 南梁 period. The Southern Liang (502–557) was founded by Xiao Yan (Emperor Wu), a devout Buddhist whose long reign saw cultural flourishing before the catastrophic Hou Jing rebellion. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

description: 崔仲哲（473—507年），北魏人物。北魏（386—534年）是北朝的第一个朝代，鲜卑拓跋氏建立，统一北方，孝文帝推行汉化改革，迁都洛阳，对民族融合贡献巨大。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。

Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

descriptionEn: 杜行寶 (485–566) was a figure of the 南北朝 period. The Northern and Southern Dynasties period (420–589) was an era of division between northern and southern China, marked by frequent regime changes and significant ethnic integration. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

It established the Three Departments and Six Ministries system, the imperial examination, and the Grand Canal, laying the foundation for the Tang golden age. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

name: 王行淹
summary: 周时期历史人物，生于625—686年，曾任官职。其事迹见于相关史料记载。
summaryEn: Historical figure of the 周 period, lived 625–686, held an official post. Documented in historical sources.
description: 王行淹（625—686年），周人物。周朝（前1046—前256年）是中国历史上存续时间最长的王朝，约八百年。西周定都镐京（今西安），创分封制与礼乐制度；东周王室衰微，进入诸侯争霸的春秋战国时代，诸子百家思想繁荣。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 王行淹 (625–686) was a figure of the 周 period. The Zhou dynasty (1046–256 BCE) was the longest-lasting dynasty in Chinese history, spanning nearly eight centuries. The Western Zhou established feudalism and the ritual-music system; the Eastern Zhou saw the rise of contending states and the flourishing of the Hundred Schools of Thought. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

description: 李玄福（630—703年），周人物。周朝（前1046—前256年）是中国历史上存续时间最长的王朝，约八百年。西周定都镐京（今西安），创分封制与礼乐制度；东周王室衰微，进入诸侯争霸的春秋战国时代，诸子百家思想繁荣。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 李玄福 (630–703) was a figure of the 周 period. The Zhou dynasty (1046–256 BCE) was the longest-lasting dynasty in Chinese history, spanning nearly eight centuries. The Western Zhou established feudalism and the ritual-music system; the Eastern Zhou saw the rise of contending states and the flourishing of the Hundred Schools of Thought. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

The Western Zhou established feudalism and the ritual-music system; the Eastern Zhou saw the rise of contending states and the flourishing of the Hundred Schools of Thought. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

summaryEn: Historical figure of the 周 period, lived 635–695, held official positions. Documented in historical sources.
description: 鄭宏（635—695年），周人物。周朝（前1046—前256年）是中国历史上存续时间最长的王朝，约八百年。西周定都镐京（今西安），创分封制与礼乐制度；东周王室衰微，进入诸侯争霸的春秋战国时代，诸子百家思想繁荣。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 鄭宏 (635–695) was a figure of the 周 period. The Zhou dynasty (1046–256 BCE) was the longest-lasting dynasty in Chinese history, spanning nearly eight centuries. The Western Zhou established feudalism and the ritual-music system; the Eastern Zhou saw the rise of contending states and the flourishing of the Hundred Schools of Thought. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

description: 元瑛（637—703年），周人物。周朝（前1046—前256年）是中国历史上存续时间最长的王朝，约八百年。西周定都镐京（今西安），创分封制与礼乐制度；东周王室衰微，进入诸侯争霸的春秋战国时代，诸子百家思想繁荣。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 元瑛 (637–703) was a figure of the 周 period. The Zhou dynasty (1046–256 BCE) was the longest-lasting dynasty in Chinese history, spanning nearly eight centuries. The Western Zhou established feudalism and the ritual-music system; the Eastern Zhou saw the rise of contending states and the flourishing of the Hundred Schools of Thought. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.

summaryEn: Historical figure of the 周 period, lived 668–697. Documented in historical sources.
description: 王元璋（668—697年），周人物。周朝（前1046—前256年）是中国历史上存续时间最长的王朝，约八百年。西周定都镐京（今西安），创分封制与礼乐制度；东周王室衰微，进入诸侯争霸的春秋战国时代，诸子百家思想繁荣。关于其生平与事迹的记载，散见于相关史籍文献之中，反映了当时的历史风貌与社会环境。
descriptionEn: 王元璋 (668–697) was a figure of the 周 period. The Zhou dynasty (1046–256 BCE) was the longest-lasting dynasty in Chinese history, spanning nearly eight centuries. The Western Zhou established feudalism and the ritual-music system; the Eastern Zhou saw the rise of contending states and the flourishing of the Hundred Schools of Thought. Records of their life and deeds are preserved in historical texts and documents, reflecting the historical context and social environment of the era.
